channel.title: Emacs on emsenn.net
channel.description: Recent content in Emacs on emsenn.net

item.title: GnoponEmacs Overview
item.description:
GnoponEmacs is the Emacs environment for interacting with the Emsemioverse.

Purpose

  • Provide a consistent editing environment.
  • Support semiotic workflows across markdown, skills, and study materials.
  • Serve as the primary TUI/GUI for agents and humans.

item.title: GnoponEmacs Setup
item.description:
This lesson outlines the setup steps for GnoponEmacs in this repository.

Setup steps

  • Use the repository init.el as the base configuration.
  • Keep settings in version control and avoid local-only divergences when possible.
  • Document any new packages or keybindings in the GnoponEmacs README.

item.title: Markdown Vault Workflows
item.description:
GnoponEmacs should make it easy to navigate and edit a markdown vault.

Core workflows

  • Open a vault root and browse by file, tag, or link.
  • Jump between linked files and maintain backlinks.
  • Inspect and edit frontmatter with minimal friction.

Semiotic extensions

  • Surface interaction terms from headings and links.
  • Generate or open vault index files for overview navigation.
